steps.title: Identify what needs introducing
steps.content: After the blank, we have three items beginning with “the” and separated by commas: “the gathering of central themes and tensions,” “the tossing of these elements into a dynamic narrative,” and “the catching of the resolutions that emerge.” These form a series that needs to be introduced.

steps.title: Choose the punctuation that introduces a series
steps.content: A colon introduces a list or elaboration, which correctly connects “routine” to the three parallel elements. The semicolon incorrectly requires an independent clause, while the comma and period fail to introduce the series. That matches choice D — D is correct.
